integration_validation_v2.gap: Backup Fixture Corpus deliverable is absent: no backup fixture JSON and no fixture-corpus round-trip test for version/refusal rules.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: tests/atelier_fixture_corpus_tests.rs covers only MT-061..065; ls fixtures/atelier_core_data has no backup fixture; grep backup_manifest in tests/fixtures returns nothing. Backup version/refusal behavior is tested inline at atelier_core_data_tests.rs:7377 (MT-049) with programmatic data, not a portable fixture corpus

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Fixture backup_restore_preflight.json (4 backups with app/spec/schema version traceability + checksummed extra_files, 4 preflight scenarios pinning accepted/refused + refusal_contains). Test mt079 at atelier_fixture_corpus_tests.rs:2241: real record_backup_manifest, get_backup_manifest re-read from PG, preflight_backup_restore; version/refusal rules proven against production messages (exports.rs:1098-1110); EventLedger counts per backup and per scenario.
integration_validation_v3.gap: Shared informational: corpus tests soft-skip when PG binaries absent (repo-standard pattern; PG present on this machine, tests ran).
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
